lessons.title: Introduction to Arrays 🚂
lessons.description: Store massive perfectly ordered lists of data.

lessons.title: Array Methods (Push, Pop) 🏗️
lessons.description: Learn to easily add, remove, and modify array items.

lessons.title: Iterating Arrays 🔁
lessons.description: Combine Loops and Arrays to process huge amounts of data quickly.

lessons.title: Introduction to Objects 🗄️
lessons.description: Store complex, organized data perfectly labeled with keys.

lessons.title: Objects inside Arrays 🧱
lessons.description: Combine arrays and objects to mimic real-world databases.
